steps.t: The river Anduin runs northwards from the Vineyards of Lórien. Farasdúr has asked you to patrol the banks of the Anduin and ensure that no enemy force…

The river Anduin runs northwards from the Vineyards of Lórien. Farasdúr has asked you to patrol the banks of the Anduin and ensure that no enemy force…
Farasdúr is near the Vineyards of Lórien, south of the Anduin. You should return to Farasdúr and tell him the results of your patrol.
